headline: HCA Healthcare (HCA): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, HCA Healthcare’s stock price fell to $423.55. Shareholders have lost 11.6% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 9%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
